message: Oh, you’re the one who came to see Anna, right?
You remember me, right? We met in Little Italy.
Since then, Anna has moved away. Apparently, she said she was going back to her country.
Speaking of which, I just saw the actress Meryl Ann Kline.
What!? Where did you see her?
She was standing right by the entrance of the art museum, all alone, probably waiting for someone.
Oh dear, it’s already this late. Well, I’ll excuse myself and be on my way.
Speaking of which, what happened to Cindy and Yuriko?
It’s sadly empty; let’s go somewhere else.
